form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when seventh at this track on April 1. Proved too good the start before at this track on March 5. Best form should see him in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Showed gate speed and raced outside the leader for the duration of the event.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 5th (Fr6) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 7 m by Sports Bounty (2:34.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 48 on March 31 at $4.80. At the previous start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1780m after racing wide at this track, beaten 5 m by Pennie Packer (2:09.60) in 3yo+ NR 41 to 47 on March 19 at $4.20. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 1.2 m (Sr3) at this track (2:10.40) beating Dipped In Silver in 3yo+ NR 40 to 44 on April 1 at $7. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 4.5 m by Prince Joy (2:10.70) in 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $7. Will not find this easy. Prefer others on this occasion.
